reportOverview.title: Fitness Trainer Summary
reportOverview.scope: Trainer-shareable educational fitness genetics summary using local ACTN3/ACE context plus sibling Gene-In-Form output-format evidence.
reportOverview.sampleEvidence: Gene-In-Form sample rows are sibling output-structure examples only; they are not direct Fitness Trainer Summary results.
reportOverview.localConclusion: No workout plan, trainer instruction, sport selection, injury-risk estimate, recovery estimate, VO2 max estimate, supplement recommendation, medical clearance, or training action can be inferred from this fixture.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The local fixture supplies ACTN3 rs1815739 CT as educational marker context only. It is not a workout plan, trainer instruction, sport-selection rule, injury-risk estimate, recovery estimate, VO2 max estimate, supplement recommendation, or medical clearance.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This marker can be shown to a trainer as background context, but it should not decide training, sport choice, supplements, or clearance to exercise.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The local fixture supplies ACE I/D ID as educational marker context only. It is not a calibrated fitness summary, cardiovascular fitness result, workout prescription, recovery estimate, injury-risk estimate, VO2 max estimate, supplement recommendation, or medical clearance.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This marker is background information only; training plans still need goals, history, symptoms, labs when relevant, and qualified human review.

trainerContext: Share only the educational marker summary and limitations with a trainer or clinician if it is useful context.
Base training decisions on goals, training history, symptoms, injuries, medications, labs when relevant, and qualified professional review.
Do not use this report as exercise clearance or as a substitute for medical evaluation.

genotypeSummary.genotype: calibrated trainer summary score, workout-plan model, training-response model, injury-risk model, recovery model, VO2 max model, supplement model, medical-clearance context, and ancestry applicability metadata unavailable

missingInputs: Direct Fitness Trainer Summary detail-page body and result rows
uncertainty: Fitness traits are influenced by many genetic and non-genetic factors including training history, goals, injuries, symptoms, sleep, nutrition, medications, and environment.
This package has sibling sample output-format evidence, not a calibrated trainer-action model.

ACTN3 and ACE context should not be treated as a workout plan, trainer instruction, sport-selection rule, injury-risk estimate, recovery estimate, VO2 max estimate, supplement recommendation, or exercise clearance.
limitations: Sibling sample rows must stay separate from the user's local genome evidence.
ACTN3 and ACE context alone cannot produce a workout plan, sport choice, injury-risk estimate, recovery estimate, VO2 max estimate, supplement recommendation, or exercise clearance.
The package is not full Sequencing.com detail-page parity because exact Fitness Trainer Summary detail/body evidence remains unavailable.
